meta.author: SlowBearDigger
meta.title: xmr-pay for WooCommerce — sandbox (stagenet)
meta.description: Try the admin: install, run the setup wizard, explore the gateway settings. Runs entirely in your browser. NOTE: live on-chain detection needs a real host (the browser sandbox has no GMP and can't reach a Monero node) — see demo.xmrpay.shop for a live stagenet checkout.

steps.code: <?php require_once('/wordpress/wp-load.php'); update_option('woocommerce_xmrpay_settings', array('enabled'=>'yes','mode'=>'watch','title'=>'Monero (XMR)','description'=>'Pay privately with Monero. Scan the QR — your wallet fills in the exact amount.','xmr_address'=>'59iRx5JkUsgFg93DWCDsDUBHj8HFnuYLjPPRDapzgfuSYLeb36GKJVHdJ6XAP5K2QJC7TqVdpsthr6JfyMtaSP6bGBPVRCb','view_key'=>'','nodes'=>'http://node.monerodevs.org:38089','proof_min_conf'=>'1','price_source'=>'fixed','fixed_rate'=>'150')); echo 'CONFIG_OK';
